name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.13.1: hot-fix bumping ooxml-swift to v0.19.1 — fixes pPr double-emission silent regression on sort-by-position round-trip (caught during NTPU thesis verification, no source changes). v3.13.0: document.xml lossless round-trip (closes #56, P0) — preserves all source xmlns:* + mc:Ignorable on root, parses bookmarks / hyperlinks / fldSimple / AlternateContent, sort-by-position Writer emit, replace_text walks wrapper-internal runs (no silent failure). v3.12.0: Programmatic Track Changes generation (#45). v3.11.0: Tables / Hyperlinks / Headers (#49 #50 #51). v3.10.0: Styles + Numbering + Sections (#46 #47 #48). v3.9.0: Content Controls (SDT) read/write (#44).
